name: @aristotle/gel-timestamp-rfc3161
description: RFC 3161 Time-Stamp Protocol client for AristotleOS. Implements the TimestampAuthority interface from @aristotle/gel-timestamp by posting an ASN.1 DER-encoded TimeStampReq to a configured TSA endpoint and storing the returned TimeStampToken as an opaque blob in the anchor. Closes the in-repo portion of the 'real external TSA' story; cryptographic verification of the response (X.509 certificate chain validation) is operator-supplied via a verifier callback because chain validation depends on the operator's trust store.
